final:
module up_counter (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [4-1:1-1] count
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            if (count == 4'b1111) begin
                count <= 4'b0000;
            end else begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
